title: Design: jj (Jujutsu) VCS Support
summary: Design plan for adding jj VCS support to fzymgc-house-skills, enabling skills to detect and use jj commands in colocated repos.
notes: Classified as DOC (design rationale) rather than SPEC due to docs/plans/ path and implementation-note callouts suggesting this captures design guidance. However, the document contains highly prescriptive technical specifications (exact file structures, command mappings, bash implementations, workflow changes). Confidence is medium because signals conflict slightly: path/content style → DOC; technical prescriptiveness and structural specifications → could be SPEC.
